subtitles.english: You know what, Chichimurin?

Stop touching me.

Stop touching me.

subtitles.english: Will you forgive me?

I'm sorry for yelling.

I'm sorry for yelling.

Do you feel better?

Do you feel better?
- I feel better.

subtitles.english: And I feel really sleepy all of a sudden.

But let me help you. Let me fluff this pillow

But let me help you. Let me fluff this pillow

subtitles.english: Princess?

Okay, let me... let me just lay down.

subtitles.english:
Okay, let me... let me just lay down.

subtitles.original:
I'm already getting so comfortable.

subtitles.english:
I'm already getting so comfortable.

subtitles.english:
Oh, I'm so tired. If someone doesn't get into

Oh, no, don't, don't! It's just my... my achy,
achy bones. I'm trying to get into bed. Please!

subtitles.english:

subtitles.original:
Oh, I feel so comfortable.

subtitles.english:
Oh, I feel so comfortable.

subtitles.original:
Thanks for inviting me, Cici.
- Good night. - Oh! We're holding hands.
subtitles.english:
Thanks for inviting me, Cici.
- Good night. - Oh! We're holding hands.

subtitles.original:
It's because I... I get scared in the dark.
- Oh, of course. Yeah.
subtitles.english:
It's because I... I get scared in the dark.
- Oh, of course. Yeah.

subtitles.original:
So, I'm glad that we have each other. Good night, Cici.
- Good night, Chichi...
subtitles.english:
So, I'm glad that we have each other. Good night, Cici.
- Good night, Chichi...

subtitles.original: Okay, yeah, yeah, yeah. Good night.
subtitles.english: Okay, yeah, yeah, yeah. Good night.

subtitles.original:
I'm Cici!
- And I'm Jiji!
subtitles.english:
I'm Cici!
- And I'm Jiji!

subtitles.original:
And you're watching...
- The Autofister Network!
subtitles.english:
And you're watching...
- The Autofister Network!

subtitles.original: Ummm... mmm.
subtitles.english: Ummm... mmm.

subtitles.original: I don't know if that's going to make us any money.
subtitles.english: I don't know if that's going to make us any money.

subtitles.original: Well, on to the next idea!
subtitles.english: Well, on to the next idea!

subtitles.original: みんなが大好きっ！！
subtitles.english: I love everyone!!

subtitles.original: 延々続行 ルララ Miracle Sing Time
subtitles.english: It goes on forever. Lu la la miracle sing time.

subtitles.original: 歌って 歌って 愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: I sing and sing to convey my love the best I can.

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも 微妙な歌詞でも
subtitles.english: Even if the song sucks, even if the lyrics are questionable,

subtitles.original: 届けたい 精一杯のsoulを
subtitles.english: I want to deliver my soul with all my heart.

subtitles.original: どうしよう オートマティックに決められてる
subtitles.english: What should I do? Things are being decided for me automatically.

subtitles.original: 時間割じゃ追っつかない
subtitles.english: I can't keep up with the schedule.

subtitles.original: の！ 夢無限 したいこと怒涛
subtitles.english: No! Wanting to dream infinitely is an angry wave,

subtitles.original: 廊下もダッシュで集まるよ
subtitles.english: we'll get together with a dash down the hallway.

subtitles.original: お行儀悪かったらsorry！
subtitles.english: Sorry for the bad manners!

subtitles.original: でもなりふりも構わずに
subtitles.english: But regardless of how I look

subtitles.original: どっぷりハマっちゃうplay
subtitles.english: I get too immersed in playing.

subtitles.original: キラリっ もしかこれが青春
subtitles.english: A "sparkle". Perhaps this is youth.

subtitles.original: ever ever… Forever Shine
subtitles.english: ever ever... forever shine.

subtitles.original: ほんとに大好きっ！！
subtitles.english: I really love it!!

subtitles.original: テンション上昇 ルララ Powerful Gig Time
subtitles.english: The tension keeps rising. Lu la la powerful gig time.

subtitles.original: ハートって ハートって ワクワク探す天才
subtitles.english: The heart, the heart is a genius at searching for excitement.

subtitles.original: アレっ！？って言われても ミス連発でも
subtitles.english: Even if they go "Huh!?", even if I keep messing up,

subtitles.original: 放ちたい 湧いてくるbraveを
subtitles.english: I want to release my overflowing bravery.

subtitles.original: 仕掛けるトレモロ 応えるフラム
subtitles.english: I'll start a tremolo, a flam will respond

subtitles.original: いいじゃんいいじゃんノリノリでいいんじゃない
subtitles.english: It's great, it's great. Isn't it great to be high-spirited?!?

subtitles.original: ハッピーはいつだってね “今”感じるもの
subtitles.english: Happiness is something we always feel in the present.

subtitles.original: 生きろ乙女 本能で、裸の
subtitles.english: Girls, live strong with your bare instincts.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription Thoughts**

Okay, here's what I've got. I've got a video segment that needs subtitles. The opening scene features Cici and Jiji in a cute, tea-party room, clearly in cosplay. I'm going to start transcribing the dialogue from the beginning, at 00:00.000, through 03:39.000. It's mostly spoken dialogue. I'll make sure to note the timestamps carefully.

At the very start, 00:00.000: Cici says, "You're making so much noise!" The sound of roller skates squeaking is Jiji's orange outfit, who moves and squeaks.

00:00.000-00:01.300: Cici states, "making so much noise!"
Jiji replies, "Sorry!"

00:01.300-00:03.700: Jiji exclaims, "My shoes are just really big and clunky."
00:03.700-00:08.500: Then, Jiji suggests, "I think it'd be really cool if we were to do 50 push-ups right now."

00:08.500-00:10.500: "I... I want to do..."
00:10.500-00:13.500: "You know what? I want to do 50 push-ups."
00:13.500-00:15.500: "Me? I really want to..."
00:15.500-00:20.000: "No, I really wanted to, okay wait. I changed my mind."
00:20.000-00:22.000: "Oh, you changed your mind?" / "I want..."
00:22.000-00:25.500: "I want, um... 50 lunges."
00:25.500-00:27.500: "50 lunges?!"
00:27.500-00:30.000: "Oh, your knee hurts?"
00:30.000-00:35.000: "Oh, yeah, I got into an accident about 200 years ago."
00:35.000-00:38.500: "Did you get hit by a car?" / "I got hit by a car 200 years ago."

00:38.500-00:43.000: "Oh... okay. I guess that's just how it is."
00:43.000-00:46.000: "You know what, Chichimurin?"
00:46.000-00:47.500: "Don't touch me!"
00:47.500-00:49.000: "Stop touching me."
00:49.000-00:54.000: "Stop touching me! What? Oh my god! Why are you always doing that? Oh, why are you always fighting with me? Why are you..."
00:54.000-00:58.000: "You're just... Ah! You fight so much! No, no! I hate you! I hate you! I hate you so much!"
00:58.000-01:00.800: "Stop it! Stop it! Stop it! What about your hair?" / "Look at your hair!"
01:00.800-01:05.000: "Hey hey hey hey hey hey..." / "Sorry, sorry, sorry, sorry."
01:05.000-01:07.500: "Sorry, I was getting mean. I was acting out."
01:07.500-01:10.000: "Will you forgive me?"
01:10.000-01:13.500: "I... I guess so."
01:13
